# Deletion / Retention Matrix

Sourced from `src/workers/retention-gc-worker/registry.ts` (`RETENTION_REGISTRY`) for managed tables, and the model list parsed from `prisma/schema.prisma` (`@@map` table names) for the authoritative full model set. Every Prisma model appears in exactly one of the two sections below.

## Registry-managed models

| Table | Kind | Cutoff source | Tenant policy column | Floor / guard | Audit action |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `mcp_clients` | EXPIRY | `dcr_expires_at` | - | - | - |
| `sessions` | EXPIRY | `expires` | - | - | - |

| `api_keys` | EXPIRY_AUDIT_PROVENANCE | `expires_at` | - | - | CREDENTIAL_RETENTION_PURGED |

| `audit_logs` | PER_TENANT_FN | n/a (SECURITY DEFINER fn) | `tenants.auditLogRetentionDays` | clamped to AUDIT_LOG_RETENTION_MIN floor (sweep.ts) | - |
| `password_entries` | PER_TENANT_TRASH | n/a (soft-delete `deleted_at` sweep) | `tenants.trashRetentionDays` | - | - |

## No automated purge (manual or cascade-only deletion)

Every remaining Prisma model, i.e. models with no row in the registry above. These are deleted only via explicit application code (manual user/admin action) or as an `ON DELETE CASCADE` side effect of a parent-row deletion -- never by the retention-GC worker's own sweep.
